title: Smoky Korean Pork Jjigae
description: A spicy, savory Korean-inspired pork stew made with smoky pork, juicy vegetables, and a flavorful jjigae sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoky gochujang, soy sauce, and sugar, and stir to combine.
Add the zucchini and bell peppers, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add 1 cup of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the chopped green onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the Jjigae hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
